releaseNotes: Fixed update detection for testers on stale or mismatched alpha builds.
About now shows the actual installed Android package version and build number.
Added Stripe subscription checkout, email verification, and one-device session enforcement.
Updated trial/subscription access gates so expired trials must subscribe before continuing.
Replaced referral-code sharing with simple text/email download-link sharing.
Kept Android status bar visible while preserving hidden bottom navigation behavior.
